instruction: Update the authentication middleware so expired JWT tokens trigger a 401 response instead of silently refreshing.
Modify the user service so email addresses are normalized to lowercase before being stored.
Refactor the order validation logic to eliminate duplicated checks across multiple endpoints.
Add pagination support to the listUsers API endpoint.
Improve the error handling in the payment processing function.
Change the caching layer so product queries are cached for five minutes.
Update the API handler to validate phone numbers before saving them.
Rewrite the background worker loop so jobs that fail are retried with exponential backoff.
Modify the SQL query so inactive users are excluded from search results.
Add structured logging to the checkout flow.
Extend the TypeScript Product interface to include a stockQuantity field.
Improve the file upload endpoint so files larger than 20MB are rejected.
Update the session manager so sessions expire after 30 minutes of inactivity.
Add retry logic to the external payment gateway client.
Modify the notification service so duplicate messages are ignored.
Refactor the user repository so database access is centralized.
Add input validation to the createOrder API endpoint.
Improve the logging format used across all API handlers.
Update the password reset logic so reset tokens expire after one hour.
Modify the metrics exporter so request latency is tracked per endpoint.
Rewrite the websocket connection manager to properly clean up closed connections.
Add rate limiting middleware to protect public API routes.
Improve the Redis client initialization so it reuses a shared connection pool.
Modify the background worker so completed jobs emit success metrics.
Add validation so uploaded images must be JPEG or PNG.
Update the email sending function so failures trigger retries.
Refactor the token generation logic to include issuer and audience claims.
Add request ID generation for incoming API requests.
Improve the API error responses so they follow a consistent JSON structure.
Modify the cart service so duplicate items increment quantity instead of adding new entries.
Update the user profile endpoint so it returns the last login timestamp.
Rewrite the product search function to support case insensitive queries.
Add caching to the product catalog endpoint.
Improve the order creation flow so invalid discount codes are rejected.
Modify the API gateway so requests exceeding rate limits return HTTP 429.
Refactor the image processing pipeline so transformations run asynchronously.
Add metrics collection for background job execution time.
Improve the API documentation generator so endpoints include example responses.
Update the search indexer so deleted products are removed from the index.
Add validation so usernames cannot contain whitespace.
Modify the worker so job results are persisted to the database.
Improve the request logging middleware to include response status codes.
Update the user registration flow so duplicate emails are rejected.
Refactor the cache invalidation logic used by product updates.
Add timeout handling to the external shipping API client.
Improve the checkout flow so shipping addresses are validated.
Modify the API client so requests include a correlation ID header.
Rewrite the password hashing logic to use bcrypt with stronger cost parameters.
Add monitoring hooks to the queue processing system.
Improve error messages returned by the login endpoint.
Update the cart service so expired sessions automatically clear carts.
Add audit logging when users update their profiles.
Modify the job scheduler so tasks can be delayed.
Improve validation logic for order line items.
Add compression support for large API responses.
Update the Redis cache so user sessions are stored separately from application caches.
Refactor the notification dispatch system so messages are queued.
Improve retry logic for failed webhook deliveries.
Add support for filtering orders by status in the API.
Modify the webhook handler so invalid signatures are rejected.
Update the analytics pipeline so page view events include user IDs.
Improve the batch import process so malformed records are skipped.
Rewrite the configuration loader to support environment variable overrides.
Add throttling to the email sending service.
Improve the password validation logic so weak passwords are rejected.
Modify the search API so results are sorted by relevance.
Update the order history endpoint so cancelled orders are excluded by default.
Refactor the Redis locking mechanism used for background tasks.
Add pagination support to the product reviews API.
Improve database query performance for product lookups.
Modify the event consumer so duplicate messages are ignored.
Rewrite the API rate limiter so limits are applied per API key.
Add error metrics for failed payment attempts.
Improve the order export feature so CSV files include timestamps.
Modify the queue worker so it logs processing duration.
Update the comment system so deleted comments are soft deleted.
Add validation so product prices cannot be negative.
Improve session handling so users are logged out after password changes.
Modify the notification API so unread counts are returned.
Rewrite the recommendation engine so it supports user preferences.
Add caching to the frequently accessed settings endpoint.
Improve the audit trail so configuration changes are tracked.
Modify the search service so it logs query latency.
Update the API client so requests automatically retry on transient errors.
Refactor the background job dispatcher so jobs are prioritized.
Add validation so coupon codes cannot be reused.
Improve the payment webhook processor so duplicate events are ignored.
Modify the login handler so failed attempts increment a counter.
Update the image upload service so thumbnails are generated automatically.
Rewrite the database migration runner so migrations are idempotent.
Add caching to the user permissions lookup.
Improve the worker shutdown logic so running jobs complete gracefully.
Modify the API gateway so it forwards client IP headers.
Update the message queue consumer so message acknowledgments are explicit.
Refactor the search indexing pipeline to run in batches.
Add validation so uploaded CSV imports require headers.
Improve the API response serializer to remove null fields.
Modify the shipping calculator so weight limits are enforced.
Update the comment moderation logic so flagged comments are hidden.
Rewrite the configuration parser so invalid values trigger warnings.
Add structured logging to the email notification service.
Improve retry handling in the external inventory API client.
Modify the analytics event collector so events include request IDs.
Update the product import process so duplicate SKUs are rejected.
Refactor the cache eviction policy for the product service.
Add metrics collection for API error rates.
Improve the user lookup query to reduce database load.
Modify the job queue so tasks can be cancelled.
Update the settings endpoint so only admins can modify configuration.
Rewrite the webhook retry logic to support exponential backoff.
Add validation so order quantities must be positive integers.
Improve the notification batching system to reduce API calls.
Modify the password reset endpoint so requests are rate limited.
Update the metrics exporter so system health metrics are included.
Refactor the database connection initialization to reuse a shared pool.
Add caching to the frequently requested user profile endpoint.
